Character.name: Dr. Yuki Tanaka (Phoenix)
Character.description: Former NIST cryptographer, Crystals-Kyber designer, guilt-driven whistleblower dying from radiation exposure

Character.name: Dr. Rajesh Krishnan
Character.description: Quantum physicist at Centre for Quantum Technologies Singapore, hostage to Kronos via family threats

Character.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
Character.description: MSS operative, quantum security specialist, methodical chess player who knows Elena's past

Character.name: The Architect
Character.description: Kronos leadership, identity unknown, strategic mastermind who recruited Elena's mother

Character.name: Dimitri Volkov
Character.description: FSB Directorate T officer, Elena's ex-lover, guardian of Moscow fragment, Kronos insurance policy

Character.name: Dr. Katerina Voss
Character.description: Elena's mother, deceased cryptographer, Kronos founding member, died from radiation poisoning

Location.name: Zurich Altstadt
Location.description: Historic old town, dead drop territory, centuries of espionage history
Location.atmosphere: Surveillance-heavy, tourist crowds provide cover, ordered Swiss precision

Location.name: ETH Zurich Quantum Lab
Location.description: Cutting-edge quantum research facility, home to post-quantum algorithm research
Location.atmosphere: Sterile, high-security, intellectually charged, faraday-caged servers
significance: Where quantum threat and cure born

Location.name: Newton Food Centre, Singapore
Location.description: Hawker center, intelligence community neutral ground, surveillance hub
Location.atmosphere: Humid, crowded, every angle surveilled, polyglot chaos with steam and neon

Location.name: Moscow Quantum Facility
Location.description: Cold War bunker beneath Gorky Park, repurposed quantum lab, Phase One Kronos site
Location.atmosphere: Frozen, paranoid, retro-Soviet meets cutting-edge quantum, underground and isolated

Organization.name: Kronos Collective
Organization.description: Shadow organization of corporate titans, intelligence agencies, and tech monopolists seeking quantum dominance
Organization.agenda: Control post-quantum cryptographic infrastructure, achieve cryptographic supremacy, build shadow government

Technology.name: Quantum Supremacy Network
Technology.description: Distributed quantum processors linked via entanglement-based communication, 68+ logical qubits

MacGuffin.name: Kill Switch Fragment
MacGuffin.description: Quantum algorithm designed by Yuki Tanaka - backdoor to the backdoor, can poison Kronos quantum processors
MacGuffin.importance: Only way to stop Kronos after they achieve quantum supremacy, hidden in Moscow fragment
MacGuffin.location: Moscow facility, guarded by Dimitri Volkov
